title: Moist Yeasty Brazilian Corn Bake
description: A traditional Brazilian dish featuring a yeasty and fluffy corn bake, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal option, this recipe uses boiling water and wood-fired baking to create a delicious and energizing treat.
instructions: Preheat a wood-fired oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add boiling water to the dry ingredients and stir until a smooth batter forms.
Beat in eggs and milk until well combined.
Stir in melted butter until fully incorporated.
Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
